title: BANK OF AI LLM API
subtitle: OpenAI-compatible LLM inference
description: OpenAI-compatible LLM APIs provided by BANK OF AI.
useCase: Use for model listing, chat completions, text completions, and embeddings.

zh-CN.useCase: 适合模型列表查询、聊天补全、文本补全和 Embedding。

endpoints.title: List Models
endpoints.subtitle: Available LLM models

zh-CN.subtitle: 对话式生成

zh-CN.subtitle: Prompt 文本生成
